data.title: SEC's next roundtable to discuss crypto custody with insiders
data.description:
The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced industry insiders from Kraken, Exodus, Anchorage Digital, and others would be participating in its crypto task force’s roundtable discussion on custody. In an April 16 notice, the SEC said commissioners Hester Peirce and Caroline Crenshaw, acting chair Mark Uyeda and crypto task force Chief of Staff Richard Gabbert will sit down with Mark Greenberg, crypto exchange Kraken’s vice president of consumer business and product, Anchorage Digital Bank’s Chief Risk Officer Rachel Anderika and Exodus Chief Legal Officer Veronica McGregor. Other representatives will include those from WisdomTree, Fidelity Digital Asset Services, and Fireblocks. “It is important for the SEC to grapple with custody issues, which are some of the most challenging as we seek to integrate crypto assets into our regulatory structure,” said Peirce, who heads the SEC task force
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sec-roundtable-crypto-custody?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Google vulnerability enables convincing phishing attack targeting crypto users
data.description:
Ethereum Name Service (ENS) lead developer Nick Johnson has alerted crypto users to a new form of phishing scam involving Google infrastructure. In a post on X, Johnson explained how scammers exploit a vulnerability in Google infrastructure. According to Johnson, scammers can send valid mail informing users that a subpoena has been served on Google […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/google-vulnerability-enables-convincing-phishing-attack-targeting-crypto-users/

data.title: Will Ethereum Price Break Key Support Amid Bearish Signal?
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) price showed signs of a possible breakdown after failing to hold key technical levels. A rising triangle pattern in the hourly chart remained active around the trading asset while showing bullish characteristics. The price moved beneath the lower trendline as it failed to break upward through the pattern
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/16/will-ethereum-price-break-key-support-amid-bearish-signal/

data.title: Nvidia Stock Falls As It Expects $5.5Bn Hit From Export Controls To China
data.description:
Catenaa, Wednesday, April 16, 2025- Nvidia stock fell over 7% on Wednesday, after the company said that it would take a $5. 5 billion hit from the new controls imposed by the US on its semiconductor exports to China. Nvidia said in a regulatory filing late Tuesday night that the US government informed the company it […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/nvidia-stock-falls-as-it-expects-5-5bn-hit-from-export-controls-to-china

data.title: Here’s What Happens If The XRP Price Closes Out This Week Above $2.25
data.description:
XRP is back trading above, $2, and bullish momentum is gradually creeping back compared to its price action at the end of March and beginning of April. Crypto analyst EGRAG CRYPTO believes this week could highlight a turning point for a full flip into bullish momentum, and how the XRP price closes out the week will be very important. According to the analyst’s outlook, which was posted on social media platform X, the current XRP candle on the weekly timeframe is hovering just above both $2. 10 and the 21-week Exponential Moving Average (EMA)
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-price-weekly-close/

data.title: Ripple vs SEC: Court Grants Motion to Place Appeal In Abeyance
data.description:
In a major development, the United States Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit has approved a joint request from Ripple Labs and the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This request asks the court to pause the ongoing appeal in their legal dispute
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/16/ripple-vs-sec-court-grants-motion-to-place-appeal-in-abeyance/

data.title: Elon Musk's xAI Launches Grok Studio to Challenge ChatGPT With Split-Screen Collaboration
data.description:

source: https://decrypt.co/315156/elon-musk-xai-launches-grok-studio

data.title: China Records 5.4% Economic Growth In Q1 Before Trade Tariffs
data.description:
Catenaa, Wednesday, April 16, 2025– China has recorded an unexpectedly 5. 4% GDP growth in the first quarter before the US trade tariffs took effect, official data showed on Wednesday. The National Bureau of Statistics (NBS) said, China’s economy grew by 5. 4% in the first quarter, beating estimates of 5. 1%, continuing the export driven growth seen […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/china-records-5-4-economic-growth-in-q1-before-trade-tariffs

data.title: VanEck aims to launch crypto-related investments ETF next month, offering broad industry exposure through dozens of stocks
data.description:
The investment manager is aiming for a May 14 launch of its crypto-related ETF made up of 30 to 60 investments tied to digital assets.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/351078/vaneck-crypto-related-investment-etf-next-month-offering-broad-industry-exposure?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
